legislation_area_mapping.description: Mapiranje frontend legislation_areas ID-jeva na web search domene, CELEX anchore i agent instrukcije

celex_titles.32002L0058: Directive on Privacy and Electronic Communications (ePrivacy)

gdpr.agent_instructions: Focus on GDPR interpretation. Prioritize EDPB Guidelines and Recommendations. Include enforcement examples from DPA decisions when relevant. Cite specific GDPR articles precisely (e.g., 'Article 6(1)(f)').

celex_titles.32013L0040: Directive on Attacks Against Information Systems

cybersecurity.agent_instructions: Focus on NIS2 Directive, DORA, and Cyber Resilience Act. Reference ENISA guidelines. Note NIS2 requires national transposition while DORA/CRA are directly applicable.

dsa.agent_instructions: Focus on Digital Services Act platform obligations. Reference VLOP/VLOSE designations and content moderation requirements. Include e-Commerce Directive as background.

banking.agent_instructions: Focus on CRD/CRR framework, MiFID II/MiFIR, PSD2, and MiCA. Prioritize EBA/ESMA Guidelines. CRD requires national transposition; CRR/MiCA directly applicable. Reference DORA for ICT requirements.

aml_cft.agent_instructions: Focus on EU AML Regulation, 6AMLD, and AMLA. Reference FATF standards. Note AMLA's role in direct supervision of high-risk entities from 2028.

celex_titles.32003F0568: Framework Decision on Private Sector Corruption

abc.agent_instructions: Focus on anti-bribery and corruption: PIF Directive, EPPO/OLAF frameworks, public procurement integrity. Reference Whistleblower Directive protections.

competition_law.agent_instructions: Focus on TFEU Articles 101-102 (antitrust), Regulation 1/2003 (enforcement), Merger Regulation, and VBER. Reference ECN+ Directive for NCA powers.

dma.agent_instructions: Focus on DMA gatekeeper obligations. Reference designated gatekeepers (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, ByteDance, Meta, Microsoft) and compliance reports.

ai_governance.agent_instructions: Focus on AI Act risk classification (unacceptable, high, limited, minimal). Reference Annexes I/III, GPAI requirements. Note phased implementation 2024-2027.

esg.agent_instructions: Focus on EU Taxonomy, CSRD, SFDR, and CSDDD. Reference ESRS standards (EFRAG). Note phased CSRD application by company size.

full_eurlex.agent_instructions: Topic-aware mode: Analyze query to detect relevant topics, then match against ALL external sources based on their 'topics' field. Use Pinecone semantic search without CELEX filtering. Dynamically select web search domains based on detected topics.

excluded_domains.note: NE pretražuj ove domene - sadržaj već imamo u bazi
